lanes.name: api-mapping
lanes.objective: Implement transaction IR to Express route/service codegen scaffold and mapping report output.
deliverables: Add API mapping module under src/migrator/
Generate route/service stub artifacts from TransactionIR
Add unit tests for mapping outputs and failure paths
Update TECH_SPEC with API mapping contract

lanes.name: ui-preview-host
lanes.objective: Create Vite+React preview host skeleton contract and manifest-driven screen loader design with implementation scaffold.
deliverables: Add preview host scaffolding docs and folder plan
Define screens manifest schema and loader contract
Add minimal executable placeholder entry for preview pipeline
Add tests for manifest parsing if code is introduced

lanes.name: report-aggregation
lanes.objective: Add batch summary aggregation with gate-level totals and failure leaderboard for large migrations.
deliverables: Extend batch summary schema with per-gate pass/fail totals
Add tests for aggregated summary behavior
Update README examples for new summary fields
